Data Representation.title: Data Representation
Data Representation.content:
Decimal Number System

The decimal system is key for understanding how computers represent numbers and how to convert between bases.

Binary Number System

The binary system is used by computers internally, with only 0s and 1s to represent information.

Algorithms.title: Algorithms
Algorithms.content:
Pseudocode

Pseudocode is a plain-language way to describe an algorithm step by step before writing actual code.

Flowchart Symbols

Flowchart symbols visually map the flow of an algorithm using shapes for decisions, processes, and start/end points.
